biological_replicate: 4 × 106 BEAS-2B cells were seeded per T75
technical_replicate: the flow cytometry signal is linear over a broad range of EV concentrations for a serial dilution of isolated EVs
experimental_design: media were processed either by UF-SEC or, for comparison, by ultracentrifugation
factor_value: the effect of UF-SEC EVs, UC EVs and UF-SEC protein from unexposed or CSE-exposed BEAS-2B cells
